channel.title: Historical on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Historical on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: The Unsinkable Dippy
item.description: When Moony’s luxury cruise hits an iceberg of margin calls, only one dino keeps his portfolio afloat.

item.title: One Small Step for Dippy
item.description: Houston, we have a profit. Dippy conquers the final frontier — and Moony’s face.

item.title: Dippy at Thermopylae: The 300 Pips
item.description: When a million bears march on the Hot Gates, one green dino holds the line.
